title: Google just had its first negative cash flow quarter due to massive AI spending
summary: Google Cloud pulled in $24.8 billion, a significant 23.8 percent increase from the first quarter. With $39.1 billion in cash income, this spending left Google with -$5.8 billion free cash flow.
caption: output/2026-07-23/google-just-had-its-first-negative-cash-flow-quarter-due-to-massive-ai.txt
